headline: Payrolls Reset The Fed Debate
summary: S&P 500 and Nasdaq snapped a 9-week rally as jobs data lifted yields and Fed hike odds. Read the full analysis here.

headline: A Look At Ventas (VTR) Valuation After Updated Outlook And Dividend Reaffirmation
summary: Investor presentation sets tone for Ventas stock discussion Ventas (VTR) is back in focus after updated investor materials highlighted senior housing cash flow trends, a favorable 2026 outlook, disciplined capital plans, and a reaffirmed quarterly dividend that appeared to lift sentiment. See our latest analysis for Ventas. The recent investor presentation and dividend confirmation came after a period where the share price had fallen about 6% over 30 days and 4.7% over 90 days, yet the 1 year...
